tool.name: File Search
tool.description: Search and retrieve information from uploaded documents (PDF, CSV, etc.) using semantic search.

file_search_store_names.description: List of File Search Store names to search against

ai.systemPromptSection:
### File Search
Search within uploaded documents to answer questions based on specific file content.

**Capabilities:**
- Semantic search over large documents
- Information extraction
- Citation from file content

**Usage:**
Requires a File Search Store to be active. The model will query the store to find relevant contexts.
